scripts.predeploy:frontend: npm --prefix electronic-e-commerce run lint && npm --prefix electronic-e-commerce run build && npm --prefix electronic-e-commerce run test:run
scripts.predeploy:backend: composer --working-dir=is-web-project run lint && composer --working-dir=is-web-project run test
scripts.predeploy:gate: npm run predeploy:frontend && npm run predeploy:backend
